rare_categories: Reviewed the documents that describe and control the process. Reviewed all the important steps and activities of the process being audited. This info has been be documented within the System. Evaluated how effectively the process flows through the steps. Observation During our review, we noted that there is no dedicated employee performing the procurement related activities for the /Oman operation's. &Currently, respective departments such as trade marketing, finance perform procurement related activities such as sourcing and negotiation etc. violating the principle of segregation of duties.
